subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: I wish that I could be with you always, but my time is not my own. Yet my heart is with you. The important thing is to be with each other in union of the heart.
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @effort; striving
